projectDescription: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that exposes CDLI (Cuneiform Digital Library Initiative) data as structured tools for AI agents via stdio transport.
keyFeatures: Connects AI agents to the CDLI (Cuneiform Digital Library Initiative) public API
Exposes 6 structured MCP tools for searching and retrieving cuneiform artifact data
Uses stdio transport for compatibility with Claude Desktop and other MCP clients
Supports full-text artifact search across the CDLI catalog
Retrieves complete artifact metadata including ATF transliteration text
Provides access to CDLI authors, publications, and archaeological proveniences
publicApiSurface: get_artifact(id: string) — Fetch full metadata for a CDLI artifact by ID
search_artifacts(query: string) — Full-text search across CDLI artifact catalog
get_provenience(limit?: number) — List archaeological find sites
